project: Ghana Emergency Preparedness, Warning & Disaster Response Platform
story: Insurance And Property Damage Claim Export
notes: Damage Claim Service completed with modular Go API for citizen claim intake, authority list/detail/update/verify/close, CSV/PDF single-claim export, incident-service enrichment, RBAC/MFA gates, graceful shutdown, structured INFO/WARN/ERROR logs, in-memory fixture store, Dockerfile, CI matrix entries, docs, dashboard record, and verification.
